post.summary:
AddSkill imports a single skill into the catalog. Used by clients
adding one skill at a time (the weaver's create_skill flow, the
CLI's `loom skills add`).
post.description:
Source can be a directory path containing exactly one <name>/
subdirectory, a zip archive containing one skill, or an inline
record (frontmatter + body + references map) for clients that
generate the SKILL.md content programmatically.

When request.classify is true, the server runs the graph-aware
classifier so the new skill joins an existing bucket where
possible. After a successful write, the server triggers a router
rebuild so the new skill becomes routable on the next chat turn.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description:
AddSkillRequest imports a single skill. Source variants are mutually
exclusive; pick exactly one via the oneof.

post.summary:
ClassifySkill assigns a parent_index_path to an already-imported
skill in the catalog. Used to re-classify a skill (e.g., after
hand-editing or after a taxonomy change) without re-running the
full SKILL.md → loom/v1 conversion.
post.description:
The server reads the skill from skills_dir, builds a GraphContext
from the live index, runs the graph-aware classifier, writes the
updated YAML back, and triggers a router rebuild.

When the persisted index has not been built yet (fresh server,
pre-warm), the server builds it inline (synchronously) before
reading. The first call after boot may therefore be slower than
subsequent ones.

parameters.name: skillName
parameters.description:
SkillName is the bare skill name (e.g., "teradata-statistics").
Must already exist in the server's skills_dir.

post.summary:
BulkImportSkills converts a tree of Anthropic-style Agent Skills
(one <name>/SKILL.md + references/*.md per directory) into loom/v1
YAMLs. Streams per-skill progress so the client can render output
matching the legacy CLI's per-line format.
post.description:
Source can be a directory path on the server's filesystem
(BulkImportSkillsRequest.source.src_dir) or a zip archive
(BulkImportSkillsRequest.source.zip_archive). The service unpacks
a zip into a server-side temp directory, runs the pipeline, then
discards the temp directory after writes complete — generated
YAMLs are the canonical artifact, source files are not preserved.

Classification is opt-in (request.classify); when enabled, the
server uses ClassifyAgainstGraph with a GraphContext built from
the live router's persisted index, so newly-imported skills tend
to join existing buckets rather than invent parallel siblings.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description:
BulkImportSkillsRequest is the bulk import call. Source variants are
mutually exclusive; pick exactly one via the oneof.

SkillsImportServiceClassifySkillBody.description: ClassifySkillRequest re-classifies an existing skill in the catalog.

skillDir.description:
SkillDir is a directory on the server's filesystem containing
exactly one <name>/ subdirectory. Same constraints as
BulkImportSkillsRequest.src_dir.

zipArchive.description: ZipArchive is a .zip containing one <name>/ subdirectory.

inline.description:
Inline is a structured submission for clients (e.g., the
weaver's create_skill flow) that generated the SKILL.md
programmatically.

outDir.description:
OutDir is the destination directory; same default rules as
BulkImportSkillsRequest.

classify.description:
Classify enables the graph-aware classifier (same semantics as
the bulk path).

v1AddSkillRequest.description:
AddSkillRequest imports a single skill. Source variants are mutually
exclusive; pick exactly one via the oneof.

result.description:
Result is the per-skill outcome (same shape as the streaming
BulkImportProgress.result event).

routerReloaded.description:
RouterReloaded is true when the server successfully rebuilt the
router tree to include the new skill. False means the import
succeeded but the router will not surface the new skill until the
next manual restart.

v1AddSkillResponse.description: AddSkillResponse is the unary result of AddSkill.

sourceDir.description:
SourceDir is the resolved directory the server read from. Empty
when the request used zip_archive (server-side temp dir is not
surfaced to the client).

outDir.description: OutDir is the resolved output directory.

dryRun.description: DryRun mirrors the request's dry_run flag.

overwrite.description: Overwrite mirrors the request's overwrite flag.

classify.description: Classify mirrors the request's classify flag.

totalImportable.description:
TotalImportable is the number of skills the per-skill loop will
process (after discovery filtered out skips and failed parses).

skipped.description:
Skipped lists discovery-time skips (e.g., agent-skill-builder).
These do not produce SkillResult events.

failed.description:
Failed lists discovery-time parse failures (malformed
frontmatter, unsafe skill name). These do not produce SkillResult
events.

maxNameWidth.description:
MaxNameWidth is the longest skill name in TotalImportable, used
by the CLI to size its name column for aligned output.

v1BannerInfo.description:
BannerInfo carries one-time discovery totals + intentional skip /
fail notes. Mirrors importer.DiscoveryReport.

banner.description:
Banner fires once after server-side discovery, before any
per-skill events. Carries totals + intentional skip/fail notes
from the discovery phase.

result.description:
Result fires once per skill that reached the rendering phase.
Includes classify decision, link counts, and outcome.

summary.description:
Summary fires once at the end with the run totals. Receiving
this event signals the stream is about to close cleanly; if
the stream closes without a Summary, treat as a hard failure.

v1BulkImportProgress.description:
BulkImportProgress is one event in the streaming response. Exactly
one of (banner | skip | result | summary) is set per message.

srcDir.description:
SrcDir is a directory path on the SERVER's filesystem. Suitable
for local serve where client and server share a filesystem.
Breaks for remote/containerized servers — use zip_archive in
that case.

zipArchive.description:
ZipArchive is a .zip containing one <name>/ subdirectory per
skill, each holding SKILL.md (+ optional references/*.md).
Server unzips into a temp directory, imports, then deletes the
temp directory.

outDir.description:
OutDir is the destination for rendered YAMLs on the server. When
empty, defaults to $LOOM_SKILLS_DIR or $HOME/.loom/skills (same
resolution the CLI uses).

dryRun.description:
DryRun reports what would be imported without writing files.
Progress events still stream; SkillResult.outcome will be
OUTCOME_WOULD_WRITE for every skill that would have been written.

overwrite.description:
Overwrite controls whether existing destination YAMLs are
replaced. When false, pre-existing files emit OUTCOME_SKIPPED.

classify.description:
Classify enables the LLM classifier. The server's configured
classify provider (LOOM_CLASSIFY_PROVIDER + creds) is used; the
client does not supply LLM creds.

taxonomyOverride.description:
TaxonomyOverride is a custom taxonomy YAML, encoded as bytes.
When empty, the server uses its DefaultTaxonomy
(embedded/taxonomy.yaml). Only consulted when classify is true.
Validated server-side using the same rules as
importer.ParseTaxonomy; a malformed taxonomy fails the request
before the first LLM call.

v1BulkImportSkillsRequest.description:
BulkImportSkillsRequest is the bulk import call. Source variants are
mutually exclusive; pick exactly one via the oneof.

parentIndexPath.description:
ParentIndexPath is the path the classifier chose. Empty when the
classifier failed (LLM error, validator reject); the YAML is left
untouched in that case.

previousPath.description:
PreviousPath is the parent_index_path the YAML carried before
this call. Empty when the skill was previously unclassified.

routerReloaded.description:
RouterReloaded is true when the server successfully rebuilt the
router tree to reflect the new path.

reason.description:
Reason is a short rationale string the LLM emitted alongside the
path. May be empty.

v1ClassifySkillResponse.description:
ClassifySkillResponse reports the chosen path and whether the router
was rebuilt to reflect the change.

v1FailNote.description: FailNote is one entry from BannerInfo.failed.

name.description: Name is the skill name (kebab-case; matches IsSafeSkillName).

skillMd.description: SkillMd is the full SKILL.md content including frontmatter.

references.description:
References maps reference filename (e.g.,
"transaction-and-session.md") to its markdown body. Reference
bodies should not include their own frontmatter.

v1InlineSkill.description:
InlineSkill is a structured SKILL.md submission. The server
reconstructs an in-memory importer.Skill and feeds it through
importer.ProcessSkill — equivalent to writing these files to a temp
dir but without filesystem round-tripping.

v1Outcome.description:
Outcome enumerates the per-skill pipeline outcome. Mirrors
importer.Outcome.

 - OUTCOME_UNSPECIFIED: Default zero value; should never appear in practice — every
SkillResult event sets one of the explicit values below.
 - OUTCOME_WROTE: The rendered YAML was written to the destination.
 - OUTCOME_WOULD_WRITE: Dry-run mode; no file was touched.
 - OUTCOME_SKIPPED: The destination YAML already existed and overwrite was false.
 - OUTCOME_FAILED: The skill failed at one of: render, validate, write. Err
describes the cause.

skillName.description: SkillName is the bare skill name from frontmatter.

index.description: Index is the 1-based position in the run.

total.description: Total is the count of skills in the run.

outcome.description: Outcome describes what the pipeline did with this skill.

destPath.description:
DestPath is the absolute path where the YAML was (or would be)
written. Empty when the pipeline failed before write.

yamlBytes.description: YamlBytes is the size of the rendered YAML.

domain.description:
Domain is the skills.metadata.domain field (importer.ChooseDomain
output).

classifyEnabled.description:
ClassifyEnabled distinguishes "we tried and got
ClassifyPath" from "the classifier was off this run".

classifyPath.description:
ClassifyPath is the assigned parent_index_path. Empty on
classifier failure or when the skill was a parent-index
meta-skill (deliberately not classified).

classifyError.description:
ClassifyError is a non-empty message when the LLM call failed or
the validator rejected the response. ClassifyPath stays empty in
that case; the skill imports with no parent_index_path.

classifySkipped.description:
ClassifySkipped is true for parent-index meta-skills, which live
at unclassified/meta-agent and surface every turn via mode:
ALWAYS — they don't need a router-tree position.

linkedSkillsTotal.description:
LinkedSkillsTotal is the count of cross-skill references the
skill declared in markdown.

linkedSkillsResolved.description:
LinkedSkillsResolved is the count that resolved against the
catalog this run produced. Capped at importer.SkillRefsCap (3)
for the skill_refs YAML field; the rest stay in the prompt body
for parent-index skills.

linkedSkillsDropped.description:
LinkedSkillsDropped lists names that did not resolve (typos,
upstream packages, external deps).

referencesInlined.description:
ReferencesInlined is the count of references/*.md inlined into
skills.prompt.instructions.

keywordsCount.description:
KeywordsCount is len(skills.trigger.keywords); capped at
importer.MaxKeywords (32).

err.description: Err is the failure that produced OUTCOME_FAILED. Empty otherwise.

v1SkillResult.description:
SkillResult is one per-skill record. Mirrors importer.SkillResult,
trimmed for the wire — fields like Skill (the parsed in-memory form)
are dropped because the relevant bits are surfaced as scalars below.

v1SkipNote.description: SkipNote is one entry from BannerInfo.skipped.

classifyBuckets.description:
ClassifyBuckets maps bucket path -> count of skills classified
into that bucket during this run. Empty when classify was false.

v1SummaryInfo.description:
SummaryInfo carries the run totals plus the classify-bucket tally
when classification ran. Mirrors importer.Totals plus the
per-bucket count map the CLI prints at the end.
